programme.title: Cagney and Lacey
programme.desc: After the star of a pornographic film dies during production Cagney and Lacey must convince his reluctant co-star to be a witness

programme.title: Starsky 217
programme.desc: Starsky 217

programme.title: Airwolf
programme.desc: String and Dom rescue Doms niece from her abusive boyfriend and return her to the US Unfortunately the boyfriend hasnt given up on her yet and sends his goons in search of her Caitlin OShaughnessy Jean Bruce Scott re-enters the picture asking Dom for a job at his hangar Meanwhile while trying to assimilate to life in the US Holly Barbara Howard begins hanging out on a movie set with String and Dom Not all is quite as it appears when a serious of incidents lead String and Dom to confront Hollys ex-boyfriend and they make a disturbing discovery that could lead Caitlins death

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki learns beauty is only skin deep after she falls for a mysterious movie star who relies on an antique makeup case

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Operation Repo

programme.title: Springtime in the Rockies
programme.desc: Broadway partners Vicky Lane and Dan Christy have a tiff over Christys womanizing Jealous Vicky takes up with her old flame and former dance partner Victor Price and Dans career takes a nosedive In hopes of rekindling their romance and getting Vicky back on the boards with him Dan follows her to a ritzy resort in the Canadian Rockies where she and Victor are about to open their new act But things get complicated when Dan wakes after a bender to find that hes hired an outlandish Latin secretary Rosita Murphy which makes Vicky think hes just up to his old tricks again

programme.title: Broadway to Cheyenne
programme.desc: A cowboy detective goes up against a gang of big-city thugs trying to set up a protection racket out west

programme.title: Daniel Boone Trailblazer
programme.desc: Daniel Boone leads settlers into Kentucky but must battle Shawnee Indians who have been persuaded by a French renegade that Boone and the settlers are there to kill them and steal their land

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Both Amos and George stoop to dirty politics while campaigning for a trip to San Francisco as a delegate representing the Ancient and Loyal Order of the Sons of the Mystic Nile

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: In hopes of staving off foreclosure Amos courts the elderly spinster holding the mortgage on the McCoy farm

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Through Rogers trickery Ed believes that he has a shameful heritage so he runs away from home

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Both Carol and Ed want Wilbur to hire a famous decorator to redo the house and stable in a Hawaiian Modern motif

programme.desc: Rifleman 523

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: When a girl mysteriously disappears from school Friday and Gannon try to find her and they find out that there are more questions than answers One question is was she abducted by a man named Harper

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: An old Vaudevillian finds 9 one thousand dollar bills on the street He uses one to buy his friends drinks at a dive The next morning a private detective claims that the money was lost by a big time gambler and pressures him to give it back he does and discovers that the detective was a con man

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A fake mind reader recognizes Dr Kimble To bolster TV ratings for his act he provides the police with clues designed to show his psychic prowess

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A greedy rock promoter tries to steal the money raised at a benefit concert when his conscience intervenes

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Farmer George is attracted to Mary Jo the nubile young woman who helps out with the chores The problem is shes in love with a scarecrow

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Faded playwright Arthur Brown uses electronic equipment to record private chats of other people as inspiration for his work His subject Diane is having an affair with Carla Magnuson When Dianes husband finds out everyone is in danger

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Unethical psychiatrist Dr Peter Milne gets romantically involved with unstable Sara Kendal His manipulation of her mind and emotions makes her illness worsen When she cant tell dreams from reality he becomes her rages target

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric wounded by Alamo Joe is saved by a young boy fascinated by monsters werewolves in particular But things get hairy when Moms abusive boyfriend starts slapping her and her son around and Eric saves the day

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric locates Otto Renfield a crippled old sailor who knows Skorzeny and promises to help Eric find him But Renfield betrays Eric and traps him in the hold of his ship for Skorzeny

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: After approaching a convicted fugitive Nick is convinced of her innocence but must prove it before she is put to death

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Ryan and Jack are intrigued by a traveling wax museum that boasts an exhibit of axe murderess Lizzie Andrew Borden

programme.title: Dark Night of the Scarecrow
programme.desc: In a small Southern town four vigilantes wrongfully execute a mentally-challenged man but after the court sets them free mysterious accidents begin to kill them off one by one

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A Springwood High student is summoned to the principals office and begins having nightmares leading him to the schools surprising secret Another student dreams about failing his SATs

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: The McCoys are struggling financially so Pepino secretly gets a job moonlighting as a singer at the El Tippi-Tin

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Little Lukes hopes of having his brother as his relay-race partner are dashed when Grampa steps in to take Lukes place

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: CONTROL sends 86 and 99 into a circus to look for a smuggling operation

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: The CONTROL agents are trapped on a KAOS island

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: Its a three-ring circus for BJ and the Bear when theyre made monkeys in the middle between a shady circus promoter nasty gangsters and a daredevil motorcycle stunt woman with a heart of gold

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur is all set to enjoy a weeks vacation relaxing at home but his plans are ruined when his overbearing Aunt Martha and her talking parrot unexpectedly drop by for a prolonged visit

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: While Mister Ed phones in racing tips to Pimlico Race Course the Posts and the Addisons play Find The Statue

programme.title: Hogans 330
programme.desc: Hogans 330

programme.title: Hogans 314
programme.desc: Hogans 314

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: McHale and The Crew devise a plan - Potentially beneficial to both them and Captain Binghamton - To have a popular movie star put on a show on Taratupa for Admiral Rogers but must first scheme to get the Stars stubborn Tour Manager out of the way

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: In an attempt to impress an Admiral Binghamton drops some serious charges against the 73 Crew in return for a show of their high esteem for their Commander in the form of a testimonial dinner Knowing that no one will attend the dinner willingly McHale and The Boys plan to combine the dinner with a big crap game in order to have a showing for the most hated Commanding Officer in the Pacific

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer makes friends with a hillbilly named Branch

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Troy is captured while trying to make contact with the underground in a small village At stake is micro-film information about a new type of bomb the Germans have developed

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A Howell Industries stock collapse leaves the Howells broke The fellow castaways try to cheer them up and try to teach them how to live like the working class

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: While the castaways take precautions against a coming typhoon an accidental blow to the head causes Gilligans mouth to act as a radio receiver

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: A yacht trip becomes dangerous when one of the Harts guests is blackmailed into running drugs

programme.title: Newhart - 710

programme.title: Major Dad
programme.desc: MacGillis Holowachuk and Gunny volunteer to do some paper work on All Hallows Eve but General Craig drives them crazy Casey is running a fever so she has to stay home for Halloween and while sleeping she dreams everybody is a monster

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan is forced to become the Howells house-boy when the Skipper loses a bet to Mr Howell in a turtle actually a tortoise race

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: Mitch and Ryan play a computer-generated DD type game to rescue a man and his daughter being held hostage by the game master which the rules are you either win or you die

programme.title: Runaway
programme.desc: A group of skiers are trapped inside a runaway train hurtling down a mountainside

programme.title: Love and Bullets

programme.title: Hercules
programme.desc: Hercules

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: A Taelon shuttle is shot down over Antarctica There are Jiridians aboard but two of the passengers escape When Augur discovers Lilis blood on the ship he is convinced that she is not dead

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: Harrison is kidnapped by a unique modern artist named Quinn whos actually one of the aliens being hunted by his kind Hes mysteriously immune to Earths bacteria so the other aliens want to learn his secret through dissection Quinn wants to set up a dialogue with Earths leaders to arrange a peaceful takeover of the planet as opposed to an all-out slaughter of humanity

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: A sickly stranger claiming to be Tressas long-lost brother appears at the Langford house

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Jim befriends a little girl with volatile behavior

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: Koenig convinces Helena and Maya that their supposed rescuers from earth are really hostile aliens who want a nuclear explosion on Moonbase Alpha

programme.title: My Science Project
programme.desc: A teen John Stockwell and his girlfriend Danielle von Zerneck raid a military junkyard and find a time-travel contraption from a UFO

programme.title: The Dukes the Hazzard
programme.desc: Bo and Luke assist Texas ranger Jude Emery in tracking down hardened criminal Snake Harmon But they must rely on a little help from their friends as well as Boss and Sheriff Byrd when they find themselves kidnapped by Harmons henchmen

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Lieutenant Stone and Inspector Keller go after two insurance agents involved in the counterfeiting of an 1850 6¢ purple Guyana stamp with a value of 300000

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force takes on the absolute ruler of a Middle East nation who is running a secret slave market Barney poses as a slave part of an effort to construct a replica of the slave cells before escaping Phelps poses as a slave trader and Rollin as an Interpol investigator Finally Cinnamon will be the bait for the trap The ruler of the country has a brother who married a British wife Amara The brother if he assumed power would abolish slavery in the country -- but he has accepted assurances that slavery doesnt exist there As part of the plan Willy abducts Amara and she is put in the IMF replica of the slave cell

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon investigate abuse to babies One mother claims her child fell down the stairs but they find the father beat the child The baby dies The parents never wanted the child

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon come up with the idea of using dogs to sniff out marijuana smugglers Theyll have to find a dog and demonstrate it works while enduring their colleagues skepticism of the wild idea

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimble works as lifeguard for a hotel casino owner whose wild sexy adult daughter makes unwanted advances toward him to get back at her father

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: After a whirlwind courtship Nick proposes to a beautiful partygirl Eastern socialite Her interest in him soon disappears when she experiences the slow paced life on the ranch-and becomes obsessed with Heath

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Army scout Cheyenne is court-martialed for cowardice when he wants to abandon Army horses the Army needs to raiders who always know where to strike The post commander is frustrated as is his wife who wants to return back east

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Pascu Ion v. Hakon Foss

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Chris Smeltzer's journey into MMA began 12 years ago, through Karate. Chris' work as a School Bus driver fits perfectly with his MMA lifestyle, allowing him the flexibility to train throughout the day, as well run a karate school for kids. The martial artist lifestyle helped bring structure to all areas of Chris' life. He believes he has become a better person through Martial Arts, and he makes the mental distinction between between being a fighter and being Martial Artist. He prefers the standup game feels he is progressing well to being an all around fighter with his BJJ Blue Belt.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Cody Clarke makes a living in the construction field, doing finishing works. This often leaves only the nights, when he is already exhausted, as the only time to fit in his training. Always drawn to MMA, he started competing in small Muay Thai tournaments and eventually progressed to amateur MMA. He has the skill and technique, of a Light Heavyweight, and has been able to maintain his speed even after moving to the Heavyweight category, making his heavy punches that much more dangerous.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Xavier Sedras v. Jefferson George

programme.desc: Tara LaRosa v. Amanda Buckner

programme.title: The Heart Hayes Interview
programme.desc: Join me as I sit down with the beautiful actress Heart Hayes Hear how keeping her standards high is the only option Also in the episode I chat it up with former Supreme Susaye Green And Businessman Mr Johnboy Watts

programme.title: The Sherard Show on location at the Comedy Chateau
programme.desc: Join me live on location where I chop it up with comedy icon Mr Mike Marino As well as surprise guest Mr Sean Kanan and more!

programme.title: The Empress Interview
programme.desc: Join me as the lovely Empress returns to the Sherard Show as a new mother and hit maker

programme.title: The Sherard Show Celebrates Sherards 50th Birthday
programme.desc: Join me as I celebrate a milestone in life as well as on the show Featuring special guests Felix Mcnulty Jennifer Santos and the beautiful Irina Voornina

programme.title: The DC Glenn Exclusive Interview
programme.desc: Meet the man who created a 90s anthem that set the trend for Hip Hop Music today

programme.title: The Cynda Williams Interview
programme.desc: Meet the lady who became a star in the 1990s hit movie Mo Betta Blues Hear how selling herself out to become rich was and still isnt an option

programme.title: The Chico Brown Exclusive Interview
programme.desc: From being the Co-defendant to Rick Ross to becoming a successful film maker Chico Brown stops by the show to set the record straight

programme.desc: Gillian and Flora sense Vantus presence again and Gillian also senses a great deal of power Vantu has captured the magic of the world and put it in a pyramid When he delivers Jayce to Saw Boss the power will be his to use without interference

programme.desc: VENOM learn to hypnotize people through their televisions in order to help in their plans to incinerate an oil base in Texas

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: During the Simon Belmont Awards the Poltergeist King says that Trevor Belmont who is Simon Belmonts grandfather is a coward which makes Simon worried until him and Captain N get advice from a wizard

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: After playing a riddle game Captain N Princess Lana and Simon get a call from Mayor Squaresly that Tetris is in trouble so they go and check it out while the Puzzle King plans to rule Tetris

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Dungeon Master is captured by an evil lord working for Venger The kids must find Dungeon Master and free him before its too late

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The kids learn of a magic river that can get them home On their way to the river however Eric accidentally turns himself into an ugly bogbeast The team must reverse the spell on Eric before the rivers magic runs out

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: MAD agents sabotage a US space shuttle by planting a bomb on board Inspector Gadget foils MADs plans and saves the space shuttle Safety Tip Breakfast is the most important meal of the day

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: While on a trip in Africa Inspector Gadget Penny and Brain suspect that MAD agents are using wild animals to scare off villagers and set up a crime base in the jungle Inspector Gadget investigates the situation Safety Tip Be prepared when you go exploring

programme.desc: Scooter and Turbo struggle to free Matt Nick and AJ from the pulsar generators spell

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
